files.content:
import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "client": string;
  "company": string;
  "price": number;
  "address": string;
  "status": string;
  "date": string;
  "rating": number;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Property Listings",
  "description": "Manage real-estate listings with rich data and filters.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 8,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "grid",
  "expandableIconStyle": "plus",
  "expandableIconPosition": "after-checkbox",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "showPageSizeSelector": true,
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": true,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": true,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": true,
  "enableColumnResize": true,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": true,
  "enableFooter": true,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "client",
      "label": "Client",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 180
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "company",
      "label": "Company",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Hyperlink": "default",
        "Kritrim": "secondary",
        "AroLink": "outline",
        "Firelog": "default",
        "SassSystem": "secondary",
        "KalkiYoga": "outline",
        "Middesk": "default"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "price",
      "label": "Listing Price",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "address",
      "label": "Address",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 200
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "status-dot",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "In Negotiation",
          "value": "In Negotiation",
          "color": "hsl(271 91% 65%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Rejected",
          "value": "Rejected",
          "color": "hsl(0 84% 60%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Under Review",
          "value": "Under Review",
          "color": "hsl(217 91% 60%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Accepted",
          "value": "Accepted",
          "color": "hsl(142 71% 45%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Prospective",
          "value": "Prospective",
          "color": "hsl(38 92% 50%)"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "date",
      "label": "Date",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "rating",
      "label": "Rating",
      "type": "rating",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center"
    },
    {
      "id": "c8",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
